posts.text: The market is largely pricing in a US oil export ban: Brent less WTI spread is the widest in decades (ex the negative WTI print). Export ban would landlock US oil, sending it sharply lower while sending Brent soaring
posts.author: zerohedge

posts.text: BREAKING: European natural gas prices surge over +30% after Iran strikes Qatar’s largest LNG facility, responsible for 20% of global supply.
